/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mesh-node.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/mesh-node.dir/main_node.cpp.o" -o mesh-node  libmesh_node_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_container.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.90.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.10.1.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so
